zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicie de Montfort於大約1200年出生時，她的父親Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV26歲，母親Alix de Montmorency27歲。她和Gaucher I de JOIGNY至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1253年2月20日享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicie de Montfort于大约1200年出生时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV26岁，母亲Alix de Montmorency27岁。她和Gaucher I de JOIGNY至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1253年2月20日享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Amicie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

en.lifeSummary: When Amicie de Montfort was born about 1200, her father, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, was 26 and her mother, Alix de Montmorency, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gaucher I de JOIGNY. She died on 20 February 1253, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicie de Montfort est née environ 1200, son père, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alix de Montmorency, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Gaucher I de JOIGNY. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1253, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicie de Montfort um 1200 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV 26 und ihre Mutter Alix de Montmorency 27. Sie hatte mit Gaucher I de JOIGNY mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1253 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Montfort è nata il circa 1200, sua padre, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alix de Montmorency, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Gaucher I de JOIGNY. Morì il 20 febbraio 1253, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicie de Montfortが約1200年に生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IVは26歳，母Alix de Montmorencyは27歳であった。彼女はGaucher I de JOIGNYとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1253年2月20日に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicie de Montfort(이)가 대략 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Montmorency(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Gaucher I de JOIGNY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 2월 20일 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1200, seu pai, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Montmorency, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Gaucher I de JOIGNY. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1253, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicie de Montfort родилась около 1200 г., её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Montmorency, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Gaucher I de JOIGNY. Она умерла 20 февраля 1253 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicie de Montfort nació aproximadamente 1200, su papá, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alix de Montmorency, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Gaucher I de JOIGNY. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1253, a la edad de 54 años.
